## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The change is tied to one compiler layer or one clearly described workflow improvement.
- [ ] Behavior changes include focused tests, or the issue explains why this is docs/configuration-only.
- [ ] Parser work remains syntactic unless syntax truly changes.
- [ ] Relevant docs, package documentation, or roadmap notes are updated when meaningful.
- [ ] `./mvnw test` passes.
